# polymarket_spread (Data Source)

Reads the current CLOB bid-ask spread for an outcome token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

data "polymarket_spread" "yes" {
  token_id = data.polymarket_market.m.clob_token_ids[0]
}

output "spread" { value = data.polymarket_spread.yes.spread }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token_id` (String) CLOB ERC-1155 token ID of the outcome to quote. Obtain it from a market's `clob_token_ids` attribute.

### Read-Only

- `spread` (String) Difference between the best ask and best bid, as a decimal string.
